seo.title: Automatic Lyrics Transcription — AI Song-to-Text Tool
seo.description: Automatic lyrics transcription with AI: get beat-synced lyrics from any song or video link, then export TXT, LRC, or SRT in 50+ languages. Free to start.

hero.badge: Automatic lyrics transcription from any song or video
hero.h1: Automatic Lyrics Transcription — AI Song-to-Text Tool
hero.subhead: Get accurate, timestamped lyrics from any song or supported video link. Upload audio or paste a link, AI transcribes lyrics automatically, syncs every line to the beat, then lets you preview and export as TXT, LRC, or SRT — free, no subscription needed.

trust: Export free, no subscription or credit card

steps.title: Upload your song
steps.description: Drop an MP3, WAV, FLAC, AAC, or OGG file — or paste a supported link. No account needed to start, and no manual lyric typing required. The AI listens to the vocal performance and does the transcription for you.

steps.title: AI transcribes and syncs
steps.description: AI transcribes lyrics from the audio automatically and syncs every line to the beat — in 50+ languages. Click any line to edit. It handles ad-libs, layered vocals, hooks, and fast sections that are hard to catch by ear.

steps.title: Preview and export
steps.description: Review the full transcript with beat-synced timing. Download TXT, LRC, or SRT for captions, descriptions, streaming lyrics, or subtitles — or click through to preview the same synced lyrics as a lyric video. Free to export, no subscription required.

styles.title: Three export formats for automatic lyrics transcription
styles.subtitle: Choose the file that fits your next step after AI transcribes and syncs the song.

items.name: TXT
items.description: Clean lyrics, line by line. Use TXT for descriptions, posts, docs, lyric sheets, and quick edits.

items.name: LRC
items.description: Timestamped lyrics for music players, karaoke-style previews, streaming workflows, and synced lyric displays.

items.name: SRT
items.description: Subtitle-ready lyrics for video editors, YouTube captions, Reels, Shorts, and translation workflows.

whyChoose.title: Why Transcribe Song Lyrics on LyricVideoMaker
whyChoose.description: Transcribing lyrics by ear means replaying the same line ten times, guessing slang, and rebuilding timing later. LyricVideoMaker gives you a song-first workflow: transcript, timing, export, and lyric video preview in one place.

highlight.title: A transcript that already knows the timing
highlight.description: When transcription finishes, the result is already synced. Download the lyrics from the result page, or use the same timed lines to preview a lyric video without re-uploading the song.

cards.title: Built for song-to-lyrics work
cards.description: Get readable lyric lines shaped for songs, not a generic speech transcript. Hooks, repeated choruses, ad-libs, and fast sections stay easy to review.

cards.title: Use audio or supported video links
cards.description: Upload a song file for audio-to-lyrics, or paste a supported video link when you need a video to lyrics workflow.

cards.title: One click from transcript to video
cards.description: After you download TXT, LRC, or SRT, keep going with Preview as Lyric Video to turn the synced transcript into a full visual result.

items.question: Is automatic lyrics transcription free?
items.answer: Yes. Sign up, get free credits, and transcribe your song — no subscription required, no credit card needed.

items.question: How accurate is AI lyrics transcription?
items.answer: AI handles most lyrics well, including fast sections and layered vocals. You can click any line to edit if a word needs correction — the tool is built for review, not blind trust.

items.question: What languages does it support?
items.answer: 50+ languages. The AI detects the language of the vocals automatically.

items.question: Can I get lyrics from a YouTube video?
items.answer: For supported links, paste a YouTube link to get lyrics from a YouTube video. The AI transcribes the vocals into editable lyrics, then you can export TXT, LRC, or SRT, or continue into a lyric video.

items.question: Can I use exported lyrics or videos commercially?
items.answer: Yes — your exported lyrics and videos are yours to use. Make sure you have the rights to the music you upload.

items.question: Can I turn the transcription into a lyric video?
items.answer: Yes. Once the lyrics are reviewed, continue into a full lyric video with AI-generated visuals, beat sync, and multi-format export — all in the same flow.

toolkit.title: Get lyrics from songs, videos, and rough mixes
toolkit.description: Use automatic lyrics transcription anywhere you need clean words, synced timing, or a bridge into a lyric video.

useCases.title: Video to lyrics
useCases.description: Paste a supported video link and turn the vocal track into editable lyrics for captions, descriptions, or reuse.

useCases.title: YouTube lyric extraction
useCases.description: Get lyrics from a YouTube video when the song is already online and you need a quick text or subtitle version.

useCases.title: Song lyric sheets
useCases.description: Export TXT for press kits, collaborators, translators, labels, and publishing notes.

useCases.title: Synced captions
useCases.description: Export LRC or SRT when you need timed lyrics for music players, YouTube captions, or video editors.

bottomCta.title: The lyrics are already in the song. Let AI write them down.
bottomCta.description: Upload your track, get beat-synced lyrics in seconds, and export or continue into a lyric video — free, no subscription needed.
bottomCta.upsell: Need visuals too? Turn the synced transcript into a lyric video in one click.

items.label: AI Lyric Video Generator
items.description: Turn any song into a synced lyric video.

items.label: Audio to Lyric Video Converter
items.description: Convert MP3 or WAV into a lyric video.

items.label: Song to Lyric Video
items.description: One song in, a finished lyric video out.

items.label: Karaoke Video Maker
